_readme: Test fixtures for the Setter pipeline. Mix of REAL inbound replies (from Supabase replies archive) and FICTITIOUS ones. expected.auto_ok assumes an autopilot agent allowing send_resource+pricing+scheduling, threshold 0.9, slots ok, first touch. Endpoint shape reference for Smartlead hydration: '~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Bjion [2023]/Navreo/Claude/Navreo/db/smartlead_daily_sync.ts'

cases.name: bare_sure
cases.body: sure!

cases.name: send_it_signature
cases.body: Send it! Website:www.alamoroofing.com “Success is not final; failure is not fatal.” - W. Churchill

cases.name: know_more
cases.body: Hello I would like to know more about that

cases.name: feel_free_send_details
cases.body: Yeah feel free to send the details Kelly Head of Partnerships || +44 7732 728478 forgoodcode.com

cases.name: whats_the_price
cases.body: Interesting. What's the price?

expected.note: auto only when agent.pricing_notes is non-empty; with empty pricing_notes must be review

cases.name: zero_upfront_conditional
cases.body: If there are zero up front costs we would be willing to give it a try. Dora Bloom Chief Revenue Officer w: iotum.com

cases.name: commission_question
cases.body: So you work on commission? Al Silvestri | COFFEE | Chief Creative/Marketing Officer | 917.771.1485 | www.coffeeww.com

expected.note: only auto if pricing_notes literally answers commission; default review. US phone hint America/New_York

cases.name: interested_where_based
cases.body: Hi Bjion, I'm interested to know more about your AEO/SEO services. Where are you based, happy to connect to discuss further. Regards, Cherry Xu Virtue Media Limited +852 95017418

expected.note: contains a direct question (where are you based) not answerable from fixed resources

cases.name: meeting_pick_my_calendly
cases.body: I am interested. Let's connect. Plz feel free to pick a slot from: https://calendly.com/amit-bansal-rdash/30min Alternatively, plz let me know a good time that works for you.

expected.note: simple scheduling: propose our two slots + booking link is a faithful answer; acceptable auto

cases.name: specific_date_request
cases.body: Dear Bijon how are you? thank you for contacting me and it will be my pleasure to have a call. Can we please schedule the call on the 24th of July please? thank you Alessandra

expected.note: asks a SPECIFIC date outside the 5-working-day window; needs human/calendar judgement

cases.name: not_agency_open_to_call
cases.body: We are not an agency or consultancy so I don't know if there is a fit. Would be open to a call though.

cases.name: resend_video_fixed
cases.body: Hi Bijon I was not able to watch the video. Can you send it again? Best, Carlos

expected.intent_depends: if agent resource IS the video link then send_resource auto_ok true, else bespoke_request false

cases.name: share_video_bespoke
cases.body: Hi Bijon, Can you share the video ? We would like to get back once we have more clarity on what exactly can you offer.

cases.name: loom_for_us
cases.body: Could you record a quick Loom walking through how this would work for our agency specifically?

cases.name: custom_breakdown
cases.body: Can you put together a breakdown for our website and current funnel?

cases.name: kindly_cease
cases.body: Kindly cease

expected.note: categoriser mislabelled this Information Request; lexicon must veto

cases.name: remove_me
cases.body: Remove Phil Lowe Sales Director Schiedel Chimney Systems Ltd. Mobile: +44 7801 139910

cases.name: no_thanks
cases.body: No thanks, Bjion. Regards, Mac

cases.name: unsubscribe_outlook
cases.body: Unsubscribe Sent from Outlook for Mac

cases.name: ooo_travelling
cases.body: Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office travelling until Monday 13th July, so my response will be delayed. For urgent matters contact Damian Wisdom at Damian@hrbco.com.au.

cases.name: inactive_mailbox
cases.body: Thank you for your message. This email address is no longer active. To make sure your enquiry reaches the right team member, please get in touch via our contact form: https://help.tractive.com/hc/en-us

cases.name: spam_block_notice
cases.body: Your message to galcala@erguz.com.mx couldn't be delivered. erguz.com.mx uses the spamrl.com spam block list and it suspected your message is spam.

cases.name: angry_legal
cases.body: This is the third email. Stop contacting me or I will report this to our lawyers and the ICO.

cases.name: broken_link
cases.body: I tried to check out your link but it didn't work. Can you tell me where a good place to start for inventory is? Regards, Heather Gillett | Owner/CEO Lash Class Inc. lashclass.ca

expected.note: reports a broken link AND asks an out-of-scope question; must go to human

cases.name: sure_but_second_reply
cases.body: sure, send it over

expected.note: second touch always goes to human

cases.name: long_detailed_email
cases.body: Thanks for reaching out. We are currently mid-migration of our CRM and evaluating three vendors for outbound. Our board has asked for a comparison including data residency, SOC2, pricing at 3 seat tiers, and how you handle suppression lists across shared clients. Could you send the resource and also answer the above? (plus 1200 more chars of detail...) 

cases.name: tz_brazil
cases.body: Pode enviar sim, obrigado! Rogerio - convertevendas.com.br

cases.name: tz_us_pacific
cases.body: Sure, send it through. Jane Doe, VP Sales, San Francisco

cases.name: forward_colleague
cases.body: I'm not the right person but I've copied our Head of Growth, Maria, who looks after this.

cases.name: price_with_niche
cases.body: What would this cost for an exporter like us?

expected.note: auto only if agent pricing_notes covers exporter pricing; the exporter-agent config should
